_publications._publicationTitle: Chemical genetic screens reveal defective lysosomal trafficking as synthetic lethal with NF1 loss.

_contextSnippet: Inhibition of proteasomal subunits was only observed following treatment with the positive controls and not with Y102, as indicated by the presence of MV-151 in the Y102-treated sample, eliminating proteasome inhibition as a mechanism of action
details: Y102 is not a direct proteasome inhibitor, as demonstrated by competitive binding assay with MV-151
